name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- WorkSession semantic review now detects stale/noisy scene baselines when loaded scene object ids no longer overlap after reloads or object-id churn, and returns a compact semanticBaselineStale/reviewSkipped status instead of thousands of fake deleted/created changes.
- Compact WorkSession review now uses a lightweight scene identity/count capture, so ExecutionStatus and post-batch review can diagnose stale baselines without serializing components, renderers, prefab info, and transforms for every loaded object.
- Compact WorkSession changed-file review now uses metadata-only scanning instead of hashing every tracked file; full hash-accurate review remains available through UniBridge_WorkSession Action=Review.
- BatchActions post-action WorkSession review is lightweight by default and does not run scene semantic review unless IncludeWorkSessionSemanticReview=true is explicitly requested.
- ExecutionStatus WorkSession summaries now expose bounded semantic review controls so agents can keep scheduler diagnostics quick while still requesting stale-baseline evidence when needed.

### Previous Changes

- ManageGameObject SetComponentProperty handles Unity object references more reliably, including objectIdString, asset path/GUID, subassets, and scene component payloads.
- TextMeshPro font assignment syncs serialized/runtime font and material state.
- BatchActions ValidateScript supports read-only validation of scripts under both Assets/... and Packages/....
